error_signature: Access blocked: n8n has not completed the Google verification process
title: Google authentication access blocked due to verification process
symptom: When attempting to sign in with Google in n8n, an error 403 is displayed stating that access is blocked due to the app not completing the Google verification process.
not_this_if: The Google project is set to live
The user is added as a test user
root_cause: The Google Cloud project associated with n8n has not completed the verification process, which restricts access to only approved testers. This is a common issue when using Google APIs for applications that are still in development.
fix_steps: Go to your Google Cloud project settings
Add your email as a test user under OAuth consent screen
Alternatively, set the project to live if ready for production
agent_instruction: Add your email as a test user in the Google Cloud project or set the project to live.
